homepage.title: Home - Emma Foody for Cramlington and Killingworth
homepage.meta_description: This is the place who made me who I am - I am so proud to represent the Cramlington and Killingworth constituency as your MP.
headings: h3: Pressing Chancellor on long-overdue Moor Farm roundabout investment
homepage.text_excerpt: Home - Emma Foody for Cramlington and Killingworth Skip to main content Hit enter to search or ESC to close Close Search Menu Home About Me My Work Latest News Resources Surgeries Campaigns Contact LATEST NEWS View all All Arts and Culture Child Poverty Crime and Anti Social Behaviour Crime and Policing Defence Devolution Education Employment & Training Green Energy Health Housing Jobs Local Government Local Investment Local Services Moor Farm Roundabout Public Interest Roads Seasonal Telecommunications The Economy Transport Uncategorized Moor Farm campaign success Moor Farm Roundabout Transport Uncategorized Moor Farm campaign success March 26, 2026 Pressing Chancellor on long-overdue Moor Farm roundabout investment Moor Farm Roundabout Roads Transport Pressing Chancellor on long-overdue Moor Farm roundabout investment February 12, 2026 Civil Service Pension Scheme Employment & Training Public Interest Uncategorized Civil Service Pension Scheme February 12, 2026 MP for Cramlington and Killingworth Being elected as the first Labour and Co-operative Member of Parliament for the new Cramlington and Killingworth constituency was a huge honour. I am so grateful for the trust you have put in me as your elected representative, and I will work tirelessly to deliver for our communities, our region and country here and in Parliament. My Story My Work Our Area My Priorities Tackle the Cost of Living For too long people have seen their cost of living squeezed. I’m working to enhance working rights in Parliament and to deliver investment into an economy that supports working people, creates good jobs, and supports the development of the clean and green economy. Repair the NHS The NHS was left in a dire state by the previous Conservative government. I know how it important it is to be able access timely and appropriate treatment, or to see the GP or dentist. I am supporting the Labour government’s mission to build an NHS fit for the future Local Transport Transport is vital for people to get to work, to see family and friends, to access education and training and to support the local economy. I’m working with our North East Mayor locally, and the Labour government nationally to secure a transport system that is more reliable, is greener and meets the needs of our communities. Safer Communities People should feel safe and secure in the local area, on our high street and in their communities. I’m working to secure more neighbourhood policing and to tackle anti-social behaviour and illegal bikes that blight our communities to ensure that we have safer streets. Your Champion I was born, raised, and live in our community. What matters to people here matters to me too and I want to be our champion in Parliament, raising the issues that are important locally. I have a local office and team to help support residents, I hold regular surgeries across the constituency, and I attend events with local schools, community group and residents’ organisations. 10,891 Cases Actioned 256 Constituency Visits 145 Contributions in Westminster Be Part of Something We Need You More about Labour Here For You Constituent Support Get In Touch Stay in the Loop Follow My Work Get Updates © 2026 Emma Foody for Cramlington and Killingworth. twitter facebook phone email Close Menu Home About Me My Work Latest News Resources Surgeries Campaigns Contact

pages.title: About Me - Emma Foody for Cramlington and Killingworth
headings: h3: I’m proud to be from Cramlington and Killingworth constituency.
pages.text_excerpt: About Me - Emma Foody for Cramlington and Killingworth Skip to main content Hit enter to search or ESC to close Close Search Menu Home About Me My Work Latest News Resources Surgeries Campaigns Contact My Background I’m proud to be from Cramlington and Killingworth constituency. This is where I grew up – where my family have lived for generations, it is a tremendous privilege to represent our communities now in Parliament. Growing up my Dad worked for the NHS, whilst my Mum worked in factories and pubs to put herself through night school, before working at Northern Rock. They taught me the value of hard work, along with compassion and commitment to giving back to our community. After university, I worked as a 999 call taker for the ambulance service, and I now volunteer locally as a NHS First Responder. I stood to be our Member of Parliament because I know the huge potential that our communities and region have. I am working with a government that I believe can unlock the potential that we know is in our communities, and ensure that they are a fantastic place to work, live and grow up in. In Parliament, I regularly raise issues that are important here, speaking in debates and Questions, meeting with Ministers and organisations to ensure that I raise the issues that matter to you. My office and team are based in the constituency, and I hold regular online and in person advice surgeries to help local constituents. I live in Wideopen, as an MP I am required to be in Westminster for several days of the week – happily, my border collie sidekick joins me travelling down to London. It is the highlight of my week coming home, and spending time with people across our communities. So many people and organisations do amazing things here every day, and I’ll work hard to support them. I’d love to hear your views on how we can improve our area together! 81 Weeks Elected I don’t take a single second of this role for granted and am mindful of every week that passes. I am committed to making them count. © 2026 Emma Foody for Cramlington and Killingworth. twitter facebook phone email Close Menu Home About Me My Work Latest News Resources Surgeries Campaigns Contact

pages.title: Surgeries - Emma Foody for Cramlington and Killingworth
pages.text_excerpt: Surgeries - Emma Foody for Cramlington and Killingworth Skip to main content Hit enter to search or ESC to close Close Search Menu Home About Me My Work Latest News Resources Surgeries Campaigns Contact Surgery Sign Up I hold regular in-person surgeries throughout the constituency and can also offer online appointments. These are opportunities to discuss the issues that matter to you, work you would like me to know about, and personal challenges I might be able to support you with practically. All surgeries are by appointment only for security reasons. Often myself and my team can help you in advance to make best use of your time. Please fill out the form in full below to enable us to do so – I can assure you that all correspondence with my team is completely confidential. You can read my Privacy Policy here . Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. Full Name * else? up to Address * I require this to confirm you are a constituent Postcode * I require this to confirm you are a constituent Email * This is necessary to further discuss a surgery appointment Mobile Please could you tell me a little bit about what you would like to discuss? Are you writing on behalf of yourself or someone else? Myself Someone else If you are writing on behalf of someone else, do you have their permission to do so? Yes No Would you like to sign up to my monthly newsletter to receive updates about my work here and in Westminster? Yes please No thanks You can opt out at any time! Submit Alternatively, you can also get in touch with me by sending and email to; emma.foody.mp@parliament.uk , or addressed mail to me at my parliamentary office: Emma Foody MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA. Please make sure to include: A brief summary of the issue you would like to talk to me about. Your full postal address (I can only assist people living in the Cramlington and Killingworth constituency). If you are writing on behalf of someone else, their written permission for you to act for them. You can also contact my office on 0191 429 8750 I look forward to meeting with you and supporting you however I can. © 2026 Emma Foody for Cramlington and Killingworth. twitter facebook phone email Close Menu Home About Me My Work Latest News Resources Surgeries Campaigns Contact
